segments.text: Then spake Jesus to the multitude, and to his disciples,
Saying,
The scribes and the Pharisees sit in Moses' seat:
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: All therefore whatsoever they bid you observe, that observe and do;
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: but do not ye after their works: for they say, and do not.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For they bind heavy burdens and grievous to be borne, and lay them on men's shoulders;
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: but they themselves will not move them with one of their fingers.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But all their works they do for to be seen of men:
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: they make broad their phylacteries, and enlarge the borders of their garments,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: And love the uppermost rooms at feasts, and the chief seats in the synagogues,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: and greetings in the markets, and to be called of men, Rabbi, Rabbi.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: But be not ye called Rabbi: for one is your Master, even Christ; and all ye are brethren.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And call no man your father upon the earth: for one is your Father, which is in heaven.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Neither be ye called masters: for one is your Master, even Christ.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But he that is greatest among you shall be your servant.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And whosoever shall exalt himself shall be abased; and he that shall humble himself shall be exalted.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: for ye shut up the kingdom of heaven against men: for ye neither go in yourselves, neither suffer ye them that are entering to go in.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: for ye devour widows' houses, and for a pretence make long prayer: therefore ye shall receive the greater damnation.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: for ye compass sea and land to make one proselyte, and when he is made, ye make him twofold more the child of hell than yourselves.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Woe unto you, ye blind guides, which say, Whosoever shall swear by the temple, it is nothing; but whosoever shall swear by the gold of the temple, he is a debtor!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Ye fools and blind: for whether is greater, the gold, or the temple that sanctifieth the gold?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And, Whosoever shall swear by the altar, it is nothing; but whosoever sweareth by the gift that is upon it, he is guilty.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Ye fools and blind: for whether is greater, the gift, or the altar that sanctifieth the gift?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Whosoever therefore shall swear by the altar, sweareth by it, and by all things thereon.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And whosoever shall swear by the temple, sweareth by it, and by him that dwelleth therein.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And he that shall swear by heaven, sweareth by the throne of God, and by him that sitteth thereon.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! for ye pay tithe of mint and anise and cummin, and have omitted the weightier matters of the law, judgment, mercy, and faith: these ought ye to have done, and not to leave the other undone.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Ye blind guides, which strain at a gnat, and swallow a camel.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! for ye make clean the outside of the cup and of the platter, but within they are full of extortion and excess.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Thou blind Pharisee, cleanse first that which is within the cup and platter, that the outside of them may be clean also.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! for ye are like unto whited sepulchres, which indeed appear beautiful outward, but are within full of dead men's bones, and of all uncleanness.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Even so ye also outwardly appear righteous unto men, but within ye are full of hypocrisy and iniquity.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! because ye build the tombs of the prophets, and garnish the sepulchres of the righteous,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: And say, If we had been in the days of our fathers, we would not have been partakers with them in the blood of the prophets.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Wherefore ye be witnesses unto yourselves, that ye are the children of them which killed the prophets.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Fill ye up then the measure of your fathers.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Ye serpents, ye generation of vipers, how can ye escape the damnation of hell?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Wherefore, behold, I send unto you prophets, and wise men, and scribes: and some of them ye shall kill and crucify; and some of them shall ye scourge in your synagogues, and persecute them from city to city:
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: That upon you may come all the righteous blood shed upon the earth, from the blood of righteous Abel unto the blood of Zacharias son of Barachias, whom ye slew between the temple and the altar.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Verily I say unto you, All these things shall come upon this generation.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: O Jerusalem, Jerusalem, thou that killest the prophets, and stonest them which are sent unto thee, how often would I have gathered thy children together, even as a hen gathereth her chickens under her wings, and ye would not!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Behold, your house is left unto you desolate.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For I say unto you, Ye shall not see me henceforth, till ye shall say, Blessed is he that cometh in the name of the Lord.
segments.speaker: Jesus
